name: wc2026-predictor
description: FIFA World Cup 2026 AI Match Predictor — qwen3.6:35b + Telegram + Obsidian

scripts.start: concurrently "node mcp-servers/obsidian-mcp/index.js" "node mcp-servers/telegram-mcp/index.js" "node server.js" "node scheduler.js" "node chatbot.js"
scripts.dev: concurrently "node --watch mcp-servers/obsidian-mcp/index.js" "node --watch mcp-servers/telegram-mcp/index.js" "node --watch server.js" "node --watch scheduler.js" "node --watch chatbot.js"
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check scheduler.js && node --check chatbot.js && node --check services/chatService.js && node --check services/intentService.js
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd mcp-servers/obsidian-mcp && npm install && cd ../telegram-mcp && npm install && cd ../..
